framework.name: MetaGPT
framework.description: SOP-based multi-agent pipeline applying Standard Operating Procedures to LLM agents. Simulates a complete software company: ProductManager → Architect → ProjectManager → Engineer → QaEngineer. Code = SOP(Team).

modules.name: Environment
modules.description: Shared public square — agents publish and subscribe to messages. The communication fabric between all roles.

modules.name: Memory
modules.description: Indexed message storage keyed by cause_by (action class name). Enables agents to retrieve context-relevant messages.

modules.name: Role
modules.description: Agent identity template — defines skills, workflow, and the observe-think-act loop. Each role is a specialized agent (PM, Architect, Engineer, etc.).

modules.name: Action
modules.description: Atomic sub-task: WritePRD, WriteDesign, WriteCode, WriteTest, RunCode, DebugError. Each action produces structured output.

modules.name: Tool
modules.description: Common services: search engines, web browsers, file systems, OCR. Available to all roles.

modules.name: SOP Engine
modules.description: Orchestrates the SOP pipeline: decomposes the workflow, assigns roles to stages, monitors standardized output format.

modules.name: O-T-A Loop
modules.description: Every role's execution loop: _observe() → _think() → _act(). Three react modes: BY_ORDER, REACT, PLAN_AND_ACT.

modules.name: Knowledge Base
modules.description: Persistent domain knowledge: design patterns, coding standards, common solutions. Shared across all roles for consistency.

metadata.description: Role's _observe() retrieves new messages from Environment's MessageQueue filtered by cause_by
Role retrieves indexed messages from Memory for context
Role._think() selects next action based on react_mode (BY_ORDER/REACT/PLAN_AND_ACT)
Selected Action is executed, producing structured output
Action may invoke Tools for external data or computation
Action signals completion; SOP Engine determines next stage
SOP Engine assigns the next role in the pipeline based on SOP definition
Action output wrapped as AIMessage, stored in Memory, published to Environment
Roles query Knowledge Base for domain expertise and contribute new learnings

phases.name: Requirements Analysis
phases.description: ProductManager role analyzes user requirement, produces PRD with user stories and analysis

steps.description: ProductManager._observe() picks up the requirement from Environment
Decides to execute WritePRD action based on BY_ORDER react mode
Produces PRD JSON with user stories, competitive analysis, requirements
PRD published to Environment for Architect to consume

phases.name: System Design
phases.description: Architect role designs data structures, API, and system diagrams from the PRD

steps.description: Architect role picks up PRD from Environment
Architect retrieves relevant design patterns from Memory and Knowledge Base
Produces data structure definitions, API design, system architecture diagrams

phases.name: Task Breakdown
phases.description: ProjectManager decomposes design into implementable tasks with dependency ordering

steps.description: ProjectManager picks up Design from Environment
Produces task breakdown with requirements.txt and implementation order

phases.name: Implementation & Testing
phases.description: Engineer writes code with self-review; QaEngineer writes and runs tests with iterative debugging

steps.description: Engineer generates source code based on design and tasks
Self-review: code quality and correctness check (WriteCode ↔ SummarizeCode loop)
SOP Engine routes completed code to QaEngineer role
Test execution with iterative debugging loop until all tests pass
